name: SafetyCulture
description: Australian mobile-first operations and safety inspection platform with public API for workflow automation.

seo.title: SafetyCulture — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: SafetyCulture: Australian mobile-first operations and safety inspection platform with public API for workflow automation.

when_to_use: Mobile safety inspection app with custom API workflow sync
Automated audit reporting triggered by field inspection data
Operations checklist platform for frontline worker teams
API-connected compliance workflow for industrial operations
Real-time inspection data synced to a BI dashboard via API

pros: Public API exposes forms, actions, and assets
Strong template marketplace for ISO and HACCP
Scales from SMB crews to enterprise fleets
cons: API rate limits hurt bulk sync
review.verdict: The default operations and safety platform for field teams, with an API strong enough to justify the enterprise price.
review.best_for: Construction, manufacturing, and field-ops teams running frequent mobile inspections
review.not_for: Office-only teams who don't need mobile-first audit workflows
